title: pouteria huberiana
intro: Pouteria huberiana, also known as the Yellow Sapote or Sapote tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Amazon rainforest. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pouteria huberiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from its leaves, bark, and roots.
